title: Rachis Viewer Settings
description: Settings for the Rachis MIME renderer.

iframeOrigin.title: Iframe Origin
iframeOrigin.description: Origin to use for the embedded Rachis viewer iframe, for example https://embed.q2view.pages.dev.

iframePath.title: Iframe Path
iframePath.description: Path to use for the embedded Rachis viewer iframe, for example /embed/.
